CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(Phone), "", HYPERLINK("tel:" & Phone, IF(LEFT(Phone, 3) = "+55", IF(LEN(Phone) = 14, "+55 (" & MID(Phone, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(Phone, 6, 5) & "-" & MID(Phone, 11, 4), IF(LEN(Phone) = 13, "+55 (" & MID(Phone, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(Phone, 6, 4) & "-" & MID(Phone, 10, 4), Phone)), Phone)) & " " & HYPERLINK("https://wa.me/" & SUBSTITUTE(Phone, "+", ""), IMAGE("/resource/WhatsAppIcon", "WhatsApp", 20, 20)))
CustomField.label: Telefone (exibição)
